GG0170F3_TOILT_TRNSFR_END_CD GG0170F3_TOILT_TRNSFR_END_CD GG0170F3 Mobility: Toilet Transfer at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to safely transfer on or off the toilet at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
 09=Not applicable
 88=Not
